title: Ratna Sagar is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Ratna Sagar is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
